title: No-Scoring-Change Renderer Repair Specification

repairPrinciple.statement: All repairs are renderer-only, additive, backward-compatible, deterministic, and do not change the scoring formula.
rules: RENDERER_ONLY: No change to alphaScore, researchBucket, technicalScore, chipScore, momentumScore, or revenueScore computation
ADDITIVE: New fields added to output types must be optional with backward-compatible defaults
BACKWARD_COMPATIBLE: Existing tests must pass without modification
DETERMINISTIC: Same input snapshot → same renderedReason output (no randomness, no timestamps in reason text)
NO_SCORING_CHANGE: Forbidden to read scoreSnapshot.* and use it for anything except direction label in renderedReason text
NO_CORPUS_WRITE: Corpus JSONL files must not be written
NO_DB_WRITE: prisma/dev.db must not be written
NO_INVESTMENT_CLAIM: Output text must not contain ROI, win-rate, alpha, edge, profit, outperform, beat, buy, sell, guaranteed, or investment recommendation language
NO_SCORING_FILE_MODIFY: RuleBasedStockAnalyzer.ts, SignalFusionEngine.ts, ActiveScoringSnapshotBuilder.ts must not be modified

inputContract.description: The renderer accepts an enriched snapshot object. New optional fields added in P28C must default gracefully.

required.name: reasonSnapshot
required.description: Collapsed reason text from corpus (e.g. '技術偏多')

required.name: factorSnapshot
required.description: Array of factor evidence strings from corpus

optional.name: scoreSnapshot
optional.type: { technicalScore: number; chipScore: number; momentumScore: number; revenueScore: number }
optional.description: NEW — actual scores from activeScoringSnapshot, used only for direction labels in rendered text. Default: all zeros (current behavior)

optional.name: missingSources
optional.description: Data sources missing at score time

optional.name: alphaScore
optional.description: READ-ONLY reference — must not be modified by renderer

optional.name: researchBucket
optional.description: READ-ONLY reference — must not be modified by renderer

optional.name: asOfDate
optional.description: Date of snapshot for data coverage note

optional.name: symbol
optional.description: Stock symbol for display context only

invariants: alphaScore must equal corpus activeScoringSnapshot.alphaScore at all times
researchBucket must equal corpus activeScoringSnapshot.researchBucket at all times
scoreSnapshot values used only for direction label text — never for computing alphaScore or bucket

outputContract.description: Renderer output fields. All scoring fields pass through read-only.

primary.name: renderedReason
primary.description: Enriched multi-factor reason text for display. Observational only.

primary.name: rendererVersion
primary.description: Version string of renderer (e.g. 'P26A-v3'). Bumped on each repair.

primary.name: alphaScoreUnchanged
primary.description: Always true — renderer does not change scoring

primary.name: bucketUnchanged
primary.description: Always true — renderer does not change scoring

additive.name: renderedReasonFactorCount
additive.description: Count of factor evidence blocks in renderedReason

additive.name: dataAvailabilityNote
additive.description: Note about missing data sources, if any

additive.name: reasonRendererOutcome
additive.description: Same as outcome for CaseReviewResult compatibility

additive.name: reasonRendererVersion
additive.description: Same as rendererVersion for CaseReviewResult compatibility

templateRules.name: scoreSnapshot_passthrough
templateRules.action: Use actual scoreSnapshot values for direction labels in renderedReason
templateRules.fallback: If scoreSnapshot absent or all-zero, infer direction from factorSnapshot MA trend text

templateRules.name: ma_direction_inference_fallback
templateRules.trigger: scoreSnapshot.technicalScore === 0 AND factorSnapshot contains MA trend text
inferenceLogic: If MA factorText contains '多頭排列' → '偏多'
If MA factorText contains '空頭排列' → '偏空'

templateRules.name: mixed_signal_template
templateRules.trigger: MA direction = '空頭排列' AND MACD direction = '多方動能' (or vice versa)
templateRules.action: Output mixed-signal template: '技術面呈現分歧訊號：{MA context}，但 MACD 顯示{MACD context}。整體訊號中性，建議觀察後續動向。'
constraints: Must use '建議觀察' not '建議買入/賣出'
Must attribute each signal to its factor

templateRules.name: no_triggered_factor_context_note
templateRules.trigger: factorSnapshotCount > 0 AND reasonSnapshot is single-token generic
templateRules.action: Append context note: '（系統偵測 {factorSnapshotCount} 項因子，但各項訊號強度均未達閾值，暫以技術面概覽呈現）'
constraints: Must not claim scoring was wrong
Must not suggest alphaScore is incorrect

templateRules.name: monthly_revenue_missing_note
templateRules.action: Add inline note in revenue section: '月營收資料暫缺（截至 {asOfDate}），待資料更新後補充'

templateRules.name: chip_direction_passthrough
templateRules.action: Use actual chipScore for chip direction label in renderedReason
templateRules.fallback: If chipScore=0, use '籌碼面中性' as default chip label

safetyRules: SR-01: Renderer output must NEVER be stored back to corpus or DB
SR-02: renderedReason is display-only — must never influence alphaScore or bucket
SR-03: All template strings must pass forbidden-claims regex scan before deploy
SR-04: Renderer must be idempotent — calling twice with same input produces identical output
SR-05: New optional fields on WalkthroughCaseInput must not break existing callers (no required fields added)
SR-06: rendererVersion must be bumped when output format changes

allowedChanges: Use inferDirectionFromMATrend as fallback in enrichReasonFromExistingFactors when technicalScore=0
Add chip direction fallback when chipScore=0
Pass activeScoringSnapshot.scoreSnapshot through to WalkthroughCaseInput.scoreSnapshot (additive optional field)
Add optional scoreSnapshot field to WalkthroughCaseInput interface
Use WalkthroughCaseInput.scoreSnapshot in minimalSnapshot construction when available

disclaimer: Observability only. No investment recommendations. All repairs are renderer-only and do not change scoring formula.
